app.title: CareerBridge
app.subtitle: Free tools to help you find work in your new country
app.footer: Built with ❤️ to help job seekers everywhere

home.heroSub: Simple, free AI tools designed for job seekers in a new country. No account needed — your privacy matters.
home.interviewDesc: Practice answering interview questions with AI feedback using the STAR method
home.cvDesc: Build a professional CV step by step with AI help — optimized for job application systems
home.evaluateDesc: Paste a job description and get a match score, gap analysis, and action plan
home.tipsDesc: Chat with an AI career coach about salary, cover letters, LinkedIn, and more

interview.title: Interview Practice
interview.subtitle: Practice with AI using the STAR+R method (Situation, Task, Action, Result, Reflection)
interview.jobPrompt: What type of job are you preparing for?
interview.jobPlaceholder: e.g., Restaurant server, IT support, Warehouse worker...

quickPrompts.challenge: Tell me about a challenge you faced
quickPrompts.teamwork: Describe a time you worked in a team
quickPrompts.project: Walk me through a project you completed
quickPrompts.mistake: Tell me about a mistake you learned from

cv.title: CV / Resume Builder
cv.subtitle: We'll help you build a professional CV step by step
cv.name: Full Name
cv.skillsPlaceholder:
e.g.
Customer service
Microsoft Excel
Teamwork
cv.targetRole: What job are you looking for?

evaluate.title: Job Evaluation
evaluate.subtitle: Paste a job description and we'll analyze how well it fits you
evaluate.jobDescPlaceholder: Paste the full job description here...
evaluate.yourSkillsPlaceholder: Tell us about your skills and experience (a few sentences is fine)...

tips.title: Career Tips
tips.subtitle: Ask our AI career coach anything about finding work
tips.placeholder: Ask a question about your career...

quickPrompts.coverLetter: Help me write a cover letter
quickPrompts.linkedin: How to improve my LinkedIn profile?
quickPrompts.findJobs: How to find jobs in a new country?
quickPrompts.ats: What is ATS and how to pass it?
